privileged_info_summary: The save_diagnostic_views task requires saving four diagnostic PNG images (panoramic, axial, 3D rendering, cross-sectional) to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\CasePresentation using Blue Sky Plan 5.0 dental software. The task uses synthetic DICOM data (phantom dataset labeled 'DENTAL^PHANTOM' with 100 CT slices, 256x256 pixels each) rather than real patient data. The verifier validates file existence, minimum 20KB file size, creation timestamps during task execution, and visual content via VLM. The metadata field 'min_resolution': [400, 300] is declared but not actually verified by the verifier script.
